articles.title: Linux服务器部署 Docker + Ollama 本地大模型执行方案
articles.titleEn: Linux Server Deployment: Docker + Ollama Local LLM Guide
articles.description: 从环境准备、Docker 安装、Ollama 容器部署到模型拉取与 API 调用的完整 SOP，含纯 CPU 与 GPU 两种方案。企业实际落地执行方案。
articles.descriptionEn: Complete SOP from environment setup, Docker installation, Ollama container deployment to model pulling and API integration. Covers both CPU-only and GPU deployment scenarios. Enterprise production deployment guide.

articles.title: Linux服务器部署 Docker + Dify 接入本地大模型方案
articles.titleEn: Linux Server Deployment: Docker + Dify with Local LLM Integration Guide
articles.description: 通过 Docker Compose 部署 Dify 并接入本机 Ollama 模型的完整方案，含 PostgreSQL 修复、镜像替换、网络配置等实战排障记录。
articles.descriptionEn: Complete guide for deploying Dify via Docker Compose and connecting to local Ollama models. Includes PostgreSQL fix, image mirroring, network configuration, and real-world troubleshooting records.

articles.title: Vibe Coding 时代下的全栈开发
articles.titleEn: Full-Stack Development in the Vibe Coding Era
articles.description: 从计算机领域全景到前后端、全栈、AI 工程师的完整认知框架，帮你理解 Vibe Coding 时代该学什么、怎么学。
articles.descriptionEn: A complete cognitive framework from the CS landscape to front-end, back-end, full-stack, and AI engineering — what to learn and how in the Vibe Coding era.

articles.title: AI 原生应用设计
articles.description: 从架构对比、设计原则、Prompt 工程到交互模式，系统掌握 AI 原生应用的设计方法与请求处理全流程。
articles.descriptionEn: Master AI-native app design from architecture comparison, design principles, prompt engineering to interaction patterns and the full request lifecycle.

articles.title: AI 能力词典
articles.description: 系统梳理文本、图像、音频、视频、3D 到多模态的 AI 能力全景，覆盖代表性模型、产品与实战选型参考。
articles.descriptionEn: A systematic guide to the AI capability landscape — text, image, audio, video, 3D, and multimodal — with representative models, products, and practical selection references.

articles.title: 技术文档写作
articles.description: 掌握技术文档的分类、写作原则与实战方法，用清晰准确的文档提升团队协作效率与项目质量。
articles.descriptionEn: Master documentation types, writing principles, and practical methods to improve team collaboration and project quality with clear, accurate docs.
